title: Duplicating items across multiple groups in the same board
excerpt:
Hello, 
I have several groups in 1 board and would like to update a theme across all groups, so I don’t have to manually add them. 
Can you please explain what function I can use to do this? 
Delete

posts.author: AlanaP (Alana)
posts.cookedHtml:

posts.author: ZakiImtiaz (Zaki | readylogic.co)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @AlanaP ,
Monday has 3 themes light , Dark and night mode. You can also check the details from article on monday’s website.

Support

monday.com display themes (light, dark, and night mode)
